---
title: "Prénom NOM"
about:
  template: jolla          # ou trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  #image: photo.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:vous@univ.fr
    - icon: google-scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/...
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/...
    - icon: orcid
      href: https://orcid.org/...
---

INDEX FR
